final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing interior scene of a French romantic bedroom.

Style/medium: needs a "法式浪漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 19th-century French Impressionist interior paintings, Parisian Haussmann apartment heritage, Sofia Coppola's Marie Antoinette production design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a four-poster bed with gauze canopy, vintage vanity/dressing table, scattered rose petals
Scene/backdrop: must include a Paris street view visible through the window
Lighting/mood: needs a soft morning light atmosphere with elegant and languid mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
